# 🤖 Custom Agents Directory

Isolated agents for specialized workflows with specific tool restrictions or context requirements.

## How Agents Differ from Skills

| Aspect | Skill | Agent |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Complexity | Multi-step workflow | Isolated context or tool restrictions |
| Discovery | Type `/skill-name` | Invoked explicitly |
| Tool Access | Default tools | Can restrict/customize tools |
| Use Case | General workflows | Specialized, sensitive, or multi-stage tasks |

## When to Create an Agent

- Task needs context isolation (separate from main conversation)
- Task requires specific tool restrictions (e.g., read-only research agent)
- Multi-stage workflow with different permissions per stage
- Sensitive work (visa strategies, confidential recommendations)
